channel.title: Refresh contact form
channel.description:
Hi everyone!
I have some problems with component when frontity navigates beetwen pages. For example, I have a contact page that load a contact form with the contact form plugin. All works fine, except when I send a form, and for example it throw an error, if I go to other section, and go back to the form page, the form has the same state, with the input errors, etc... ¿How can I reset this form every once that I go to other section?
My url: https://esmuybrutal.puigmar.me/contactar
Thanks!

item.title: Refresh contact form
item.dc:creator: ferran.puigmar
item.description:
Hi everyone!

I have some problems with component when frontity navigates beetwen pages. For example, I have a contact page that load a contact form with the contact form plugin. All works fine, except when I send a form, and for example it throw an error, if I go to other section, and go back to the form page, the form has the same state, with the input errors, etc…
¿How can I reset this form every once that I go to other section?

My url: https://esmuybrutal.puigmar.me/contactar

Thanks!

Read full topic
